query:
SELECT 
  i.id, i.productId, i.batch, i.expiryDate, i.quantity, i.locationId,
  bci.batch AS bci_batch, bci.expiryDate AS bci_expiry
FROM inventory i
LEFT JOIN blindConferenceItems bci ON bci.productId = i.productId AND bci.tenantId = i.tenantId
WHERE i.productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE sku = '207')
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  im.id, im.productId, im.batch, im.performedBy, im.createdAt,
  u.name AS userName
FROM inventoryMovements im
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = im.performedBy
WHERE im.productId IN (SELECT id FROM products WHERE sku = '207')
ORDER BY im.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
